notes: v1.14.157 - Work page: the 4-card Work grid becomes 12 flat direct-route cards (DEPLOY, MASTER DOC, SCAN, HANDOFF, SOP, BOM, MANIFEST, PORT MAP, RACK MAP, CRASH CART, OPTICS, POWER), retiring the DEPLOY->TOOLS pill nesting (deploy_showOpsTool called directly; old paths kept, still reachable from Command Center). New rd_openPower() helper routes POWER into Reference->Hardware Blast Radius sub-tab (PDU sibling). App-wide responsive layout: phone <640 stays 2-col/14px; >=640 3-col/760px centered; >=980 4-col/1080px centered; #rd-botnav centers to match. All body.rd-scoped -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. 2 new tool icons (power, masterdoc) committed + precached (other 6 tool icons already precached since .144). ISSUES card dropped from Work grid (still reachable via Command Center triage, per John). MASTER DOC ships with baked-in art text per John. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP): 12 cards render + every route lands (POWER->Blast Radius w/ PDU sibling, MASTER DOC->site profile sheet); phone 2-col, tablet/laptop reflow + centered nav. ROLLBACK: revert the commit (12-card block->4, remove rd_openPower + responsive @media + 2 precache lines + 2 icons + 3 stamps).
